name: build_quadrant_phase1
outcome_goal: Build quadrant grid system and module infrastructure

jobs.label: build_grid_infra
jobs.prompt:
You are working in Code&DBs/Workflow/surfaces/app/. The app is React + Vite + TypeScript with an existing primitive system (src/primitives/, src/world.ts, src/hooks/).

Create the quadrant grid system. This is a 4x4 grid where each cell holds a module.

Create these files:

1. src/grid/quadrantUtils.ts:
- parseQuadrantId(id: string): { row: number, col: number } — A1 -> {row:0, col:0}, D4 -> {row:3, col:3}
- parseSpan(span: string): { cols: number, rows: number } — '2x1' -> {cols:2, rows:1}
- getOccupiedCells(quadrants: Record<string, {span?: string}>): Set<string> — returns all cells covered by spanning modules
- ALL_CELLS: string[] — ['A1','A2',...,'D4']

2. src/grid/QuadrantGrid.css:
- .quadrant-grid: CSS Grid, 4 equal columns, auto rows with min-height 180px
- .quadrant-cell: background var(--bg-card), border 1px solid var(--border), border-radius var(--radius), overflow hidden
- .quadrant-empty: dashed border, dimmed background
- Responsive: @media (max-width: 1200px) 2 columns, @media (max-width: 768px) 1 column
- Gap: var(--space-md) between cells
- The grid should fill the viewport height minus a small header

3. src/grid/QuadrantGrid.tsx:
- Props: { manifest: QuadrantManifest }
- QuadrantManifest type: { version: number, grid: string, title?: string, quadrants: Record<string, { module: string, span?: string, config?: Record<string, unknown> }> }
- Iterates ALL_CELLS, skips occupied cells (from spanning), renders each module via resolveModule from moduleRegistry
- Each cell gets grid-column and grid-row based on parsed quadrant ID + span
- Unoccupied cells render as empty quadrant-empty divs (subtle dashed border)
- Passes QuadrantProps to each module: { quadrantId, span, config }

Use the existing design tokens from src/styles/tokens.css (--bg, --bg-card, --border, --radius, --space-md, etc).

Write all files. Verify they compile with no TypeScript errors.

jobs.label: build_module_infra
